whyItMatters: Combines the new slow-computer-clinic receipt substrate with spatial dashboard, WoT sensors, and grabbable remediation stations. Tests receipt_panel keyword, @wot_thing integration, and @accessible traits in a unified room.
Flagship scenario now shows live segment screenshots (9/10) instead of world-model pixel replay. All 11 target compiles pass. WoT export produces three handoff sensor TDs.
Previously the most severe gap — WebGPU rigid-body example could not parse. Now parses and compiles to all 11 tested targets. Tests high-body-count physics simulation in .holo format.
